description: Garage logs-archive の daily-struct/source=routeros (Rust + Polars bronze、Phase 3 PoC) を DuckDB datasource 経由で集計する MikroTik RouterOS 長期ログダッシュボード。silver 層は廃止、daily-struct を直読み (timestamp は CTE で TIMESTAMP cast、level は coalesce(level, severity) で fallback)。並走期は旧 dashboard routeros-archive (typed/) と分離して動作確認。

targets.rawSql:
WITH t AS (
  SELECT CAST(timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS ts, date
  FROM read_parquet(
    's3://logs-archive/daily-struct/source=routeros/date=*/logs.parquet',
    hive_partitioning = true,
    union_by_name = true
  )
)
SELECT count(*) AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND date <= $__timeTo()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)

WITH t AS (
  SELECT CAST(timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS ts, date
  FROM read_parquet(
    's3://logs-archive/daily-struct/source=routeros/date=*/logs.parquet',
    hive_partitioning = true,
    union_by_name = true
  )
)
SELECT
  time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 hour', ts) AS time,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND date <= $__timeTo()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 1 時間 bucket 件数推移

targets.rawSql:
WITH t AS (
  SELECT CAST(timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS ts, host, date
  FROM read_parquet(
    's3://logs-archive/daily-struct/source=routeros/date=*/logs.parquet',
    hive_partitioning = true,
    union_by_name = true
  )
)
SELECT
  coalesce(host, '(unknown)') AS host,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND date <= $__timeTo()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH t AS (
  SELECT CAST(timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS ts, coalesce(level, severity) AS level, date
  FROM read_parquet(
    's3://logs-archive/daily-struct/source=routeros/date=*/logs.parquet',
    hive_partitioning = true,
    union_by_name = true
  )
)
SELECT
  coalesce(level, '(none)') AS level,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM t
WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND date <= $__timeTo()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

WITH t AS (
  SELECT CAST(timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS ts, host, coalesce(level, severity) AS level, message, date
  FROM read_parquet(
    's3://logs-archive/daily-struct/source=routeros/date=*/logs.parquet',
    hive_partitioning = true,
    union_by_name = true
  )
)
SELECT
  ts, host, level, message
FROM t
WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND date <= $__timeTo()::TIMESTAMP::DATE
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 200

title: RouterOS Long-term Logs (DuckDB, Rust pipeline)
